prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为9029→8602→8280→12788→10149，整体呈波动后移趋势。2024年因选科要求调整（要求物理+化学）导致位次大幅后移至12788， 2025年回升至10149，近两年波动较大；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021年35人、2022年33人、2023年33人、2024年40人、2025年41人、2026年38人，2 026年较2025年缩招3人（-7.3%），缩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校，共享山东大学软科主榜约第22名，近年排名稳定，属于国内顶尖高校梯队。 山东大学（威海）在2026年声誉评价整体偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件；抖音热度排名第20（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；历史投档异常记录 中山东大学在2022–2024年出现断档信号，但威海校区未见明显断档；共享山东大学学科评估：数学A+、中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A、控制科学与工程A、马 克思主义理论A，另有法学A-、物理学A-、应用经济学A-等，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业以电子信息类（含计算机、电子、机器人）、数学类、物理 学类、海洋科学类为主。计算机/电子信息类社会热度高热推荐，数学类推荐，整体专业热度较高；湖南省2026年物理类考生约347000人，较2025年320192人增加约8.4%，竞争加 剧；山东大学（威海）位于山东省威海市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在湖南省招生占比约2.5%（2024年数据），属中 等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10149、2026年缩招7.3%使位次前移、湖南省物理类考生增加8.4%使竞争加剧、学校层次高且专业热度偏热等因素，缩招效应略大 于考生增加效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移。预测最低位次约9654名，区间9154–10154名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were 9029 → 8602 → 8280 → 12788 → 10149, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements (requiring Physics + Chemistry), the ranking significantly dropped to 12788, and in 2025 it rebounded to 10149, with large fluctuations in the past two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for the Physics Category was 35 in 2021, 33 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 40 in 2024, 41 in 2025, and 38 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is a reduction of 3 students (-7.3%), which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, sharing the main ranking of Shandong University at approximately 22nd on the Soft Science Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation of Shandong University (Weihai) is generally negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents; it ranks 20th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. Historical admission anomaly records show that Shandong University had gap signals from 2022 to 2024, but the Weihai campus did not show obvious gaps. Sharing Shandong University's discipline evaluations: Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, as well as Law A-, Physics A-, Applied Economics A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Electronic Information (including Computer Science, Electronics, Robotics), Mathematics, Physics, and Marine Science. Computer/Electronic Information majors have high social popularity and are highly recommended, Mathematics is recommended, and overall major popularity is high. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, intensifying competition. Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, not a local university in this province, so there is no local enrollment preference. The enrollment proportion of this university in Hunan Province is about 2.5% (2024 data), which is at a medium level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10149, the 7.3% enrollment reduction in 2026 causing a forward shift in ranking, the 8.4% increase in Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province intensifying competition, the high university level and relatively hot major popularity, the reduction effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9654, with a range of 9154 to 10154.

- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Marine Science (including Marine Science, Marine Resource Development Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 9654, range 9154–10154. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<9154), you can focus on reaching for the top majors in Electronic Information and Mathematics.
